articles.title: S&P 500 futures slide after major averages rebound, traders' U.S.-Iran fears ease: Live updates - CNBC
articles.description: Stocks rebounded on Wednesday, buoyed by gains in technology and semiconductor giants. Oil prices stabilized after this week's surge.
articles.content:
S&P 500 futures slid early Thursday after major averages posted gains in the previous session, as investor jitters around the U.S.-Iran war eased.
